keyword: use baby monitor as pet camera
title: Using a Baby Monitor as a Pet Camera (Cheap Alternative)
meta: How a spare baby monitor can double as a pet cam — pros, cons and privacy.
intro: Baby monitors are a low-cost way to watch a pet, often with no subscription and strong night vision. They trade pet-specific apps for simplicity.

sections.body: No monthly fee, great night vision, often two-way audio, local or FHSS (private) signals.
No pet alerts, no treat toss, limited app features, range limits.
FHSS monitors don't go online — strongest privacy; Wi-Fi baby cams do.

products.name: Baby Monitor with Camera
products.asin_query: baby monitor camera two way audio

faq.q: Is a baby monitor better than a pet cam?
faq.a: For simple watching, yes and cheaper; for features, no.
FHSS models aren't online; treat Wi-Fi ones like any cam.
